scripts.build: npm run build:client && npm run build:server
scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n CLIENT,SERVER -c cyan,green "npm run dev:client" "npm run dev:server"
scripts.dev:all: concurrently -k -n CLIENT,SERVER,CHAT -c cyan,green,magenta "npm run dev:client" "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:chat"
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm --prefix ./client install && npm --prefix ./server install
